scripts.docs: pnpm run typedocs && pnpm run docs:build
scripts.docs:commit: pnpm run docs && git add . && git commit -m "Updated generated documentation" && git push
scripts.docs:build: vitepress build docs && rm -rf docs/.vitepress/dist/typedoc && cp -R docs/typedoc docs/.vitepress/dist/typedoc
scripts.build: pnpm run delete:target && pnpm run lint && pnpm run compile && pnpm run test:coverage
scripts.copy: cp package.json target/out/package.json && cp LICENCE target/out/LICENCE && node scripts/readme
scripts.publish:prepatch: pnpm run build && pnpm version prepatch && pnpm run copy && pnpm publish target/out
scripts.publish:patch: pnpm run build && pnpm version patch && pnpm run copy && pnpm publish target/out
scripts.publish:minor: pnpm run build && pnpm version minor && pnpm run copy && pnpm publish target/out
scripts.publish:major: pnpm run build && pnpm version major && pnpm run copy && pnpm publish target/out
